arts.sum: Manchester United reportedly closely monitor Juventus attacker Kenan Yildiz ahead of next summer's transfer window.

arts.ttl: Arsenal to play 500th match at Emirates Stadium
arts.sum: We’ve played 348 league games at Emirates Stadium (69.7% of the total) winning 230, drawing 72 and losing the other 46. Wednesday’s meeting with Manchester United will be a landmark game for the club, as we play our 500th competitive men’s first-team match at Emirates Stadium.

arts.ttl: Manchester United likelier to move for player at €70m+bonuses – Much more attractive deal
arts.sum: Manchester United are in the picture to sign Sporting’s Viktor Gyökeres. Recent claims in the UK stated the Red Devils had already made contact for the striker, but this was dismissed by A Bola on Tuesday. Wednesday’s edition of A Bola relays that and then states Manchester United are one of the ‘most interested’ parties. arts.ttl: Arsenal player’s agent drama key in transfer saga – Gunners exit overshadowed
arts.sum: Arsenal and Gabriel Jesus are open to parting ways in the January transfer window if a deal is in ‘the interests of all parties’. That’s according to UOL, who report that Jesus will be entering the window ‘without official representation’ after parting ways with his previous agent.
